entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The primary legume crop being sequenced and studied.

entities.name: CHICKPEA GENOME
entities.description: The complete set of genetic material of the chickpea plant.

entities.name: GENOME ASSEMBLY
entities.description: The process of constructing the draft genome sequence from scaffolds.

entities.name: K-MER ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to estimate the total size of the genome.

entities.name: GENE ANNOTATION
entities.description: The process of identifying and labeling genes and their functional regions.

entities.name: UTR
entities.description: Untranslated regions of the predicted gene models.

entities.name: PROMOTER
entities.description: DNA regions that initiate transcription of genes.

entities.name: GENOME DUPLICATION ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis used to identify duplicated genomic regions.

entities.name: SYNTENY ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis of the physical colocalization of genetic loci between different species.

entities.name: LEGUME CROPS
entities.description: Closely related crops used for comparative genomic analysis.

entities.name: GENE CONSERVATION
entities.description: The preservation of gene sequences across different species.

entities.name: SEGMENTAL DUPLICATIONS
entities.description: Large blocks of duplicated DNA sequences within the genome.

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the crop to resist pathogens, of agronomic importance.

entities.name: GENOME-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding strategy that utilizes genomic information to improve crop traits.

entities.name: DIVERSITY
entities.description: The genetic variation present within the chickpea species.

entities.name: DOMESTICATION
entities.description: The process of adapting wild chickpea for agricultural use.
